arts.ttl: Leeds United promotion rivals make transfer appeal after injury blow
arts.sum: The Blades saw defender Harry Souttar return to parent club Leicester after he snapped his Achilles to end his season, That has left them short of cover at the back, with Jack Robinson and Anel Ahmedhozic experienced centre-backs, along with and 21-year-old Jamal Baptisite - and Wilder is hopeful of some new additions. One significant factor yet to play out is the January transfer window, with clubs able to add to their squads for the rigours of the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United already scouting for attacking mid alternatives to new transfer blow
arts.sum: A report from Give Me Sport this week has shared that Leeds are not going to be able to land Aston Villa attacking midfielder Emi Buendia. Leeds United are not going to be able to land Emi Buendia from Aston Villa in the January window, so it is claimed the 49ers are now shortlisting other targets.

arts.ttl: Leeds United set sights on 28-y/o Farke favourite compared to John Stones
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be keen on signing Borussia Monchengladbach centre-back Nico Elvedi, but they may have to wait until the summer. According to Give Me Sport, Leeds are said to be monitoring the situation of Bundesliga centre-back Nico Elvedi, currently playing for Borussia Monchengladbach.

arts.ttl: Leeds vs Blackburn: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leeds enter 2025 at the top of the Championship and they face play-off hopefuls Blackburn at Elland Road on New Year's Day. The Championship is typically tight, mind, and an extension of Blackburn's unproductive run into the new year could see Eustace's side slip towards mid-table.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke already knows Leeds United's biggest task for Blackburn test
arts.sum: Leeds United know they will have to do something they have not managed in their previous two meetings against a John Eustace side when they face Blackburn Rovers at Elland Road on New Year's Day. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Blackburn 'excited' for Elland Road challenge amid Leeds United quality verdict
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers will be 'ready' for the challenge of facing Leeds United this afternoon, as manager John Eustace looks to record their third consecutive win over the Whites. However, following 1-0 wins for Blackburn in their last two encounters with Leeds, Eustace is relishing the challenge of going toe-to-toe with what he considers to be the 'top team in the division'.
